notable_excerpts: Our Pune, Shivajinagar, Bangalore Global City Phase 1, and Chennai Innovation Campus Tower-1 have received LEED Platinum certification from USGBC.
We achieved recognition in the top 1% globally for the environment theme.
We have been recognized as one of the Financial Times’ Best Employers in Asia-Pacific 2026.
More than 50% of our employees achieving intermediate or advanced AI skills.
Over 70% of workforce has now been covered under Tech + Domain skilling across various competency levels.
We won the Golden Peacock Award for Risk Management 2025.
We achieved an exceptional FTSE Russell score of 4.6 out of 5.
Our RightAction™ governance framework supports our AI initiatives.

chain_of_thought: The company demonstrates strong environmental initiatives with LEED certifications and top global environmental rankings. Socially, it focuses on employee development and has received recognition as a top employer. Governance is robust, with awards for risk management and high ESG benchmark scores.
strengths: Strong focus on employee development and recognition as a top employer.
weaknesses: Limited specific details on carbon emissions or renewable energy initiatives.
